executives.name: Toni Townes-Whitley
executives.background: Ms. Townes-Whitley has served as our Chief Executive Officer since October 2023. Prior to joining SAIC, she served as President, U.S. Regulated Industries at Microsoft from 2018 to 2023. Before Microsoft, she was President of CGI Federal and held management roles at Unisys Corporation.

executives.name: Prabu Natarajan
executives.background: Mr. Natarajan has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2021. Prior to joining SAIC, he served as Vice President of Financial Planning and Analysis and Mergers and Acquisitions at Northrop Grumman Corporation.

executives.name: Hilary Hageman
executives.background: Ms. Hageman has served as our Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary since July 2022. She previously served as General Counsel and Corporate Secretary at Cubic Corporation and held senior legal roles at CACI International.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Michelle O’Hara
executives.background: Ms. O’Hara has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer since October 2019. She joined SAIC in 2009 and has held various leadership roles in human resources.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer

board_of_directors.name: Donna Morea
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Morea has served as Chair of the Board since 2019. She was previously President of CGI Technologies and Solutions. She is an expert in IT professional services and strategic management.

board_of_directors.name: Toni Townes-Whitley
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer of SAIC. Former President, U.S. Regulated Industries at Microsoft.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Bedingfield
board_of_directors.background: Former Senior Partner at Ernst & Young LLP. He has extensive experience in financial reporting, audit, and risk management for major corporations.

board_of_directors.name: Carolyn Handlon
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and Treasurer of Marriott International, Inc. Expert in global finance, capital markets, and risk management.

board_of_directors.name: Yvette Kanouff
board_of_directors.background: Partner and Chief Technology Officer at JC2 Ventures. Former Senior Vice President and General Manager of the Service Provider Business at Cisco Systems.

board_of_directors.name: Katharina McFarland
board_of_directors.background: Former Assistant Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and former President of the Defense Acquisition University. Expert in defense acquisition and technology.

board_of_directors.name: Milton Cooper
board_of_directors.background: Former President of the North American Public Sector at Computer Sciences Corporation (CSC). Extensive experience in government contracting and IT services.

board_of_directors.name: James Reagan
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Leidos Holdings, Inc. Expert in financial management within the government services industry.
